title: ExamManager Managed Preferences
description: Schema for the managed preference payload consumed by exam-manager-daemon.

ExamProxyBackend.description: Selects the proxy backend. `proxyless` activates exam mode without a running proxy process and only allows bypass-listed destinations.

ExamProxyWhitelist.description: Additional allowlist host patterns delivered through the managed profile. These entries are merged with the built-in Jamf and Apple defaults.

ExamVerboseLogging.description: Enables verbose proxy and runtime diagnostics. Leave disabled for normal test and production use.

ExamStatusEAName.description: Display name of the Jamf extension attribute used for exam mode status.

JamfAPIClientID.description: OAuth client ID for direct Jamf Pro API access. Required privileges: Update Computer Extension Attributes, Update Computers, Read Computers, Read Computer Extension Attributes.

JamfAPIClientSecret.description: OAuth client secret for direct Jamf Pro API access. Required privileges: Update Computer Extension Attributes, Update Computers, Read Computers, Read Computer Extension Attributes.
